title: Capitalypse armor
body:
# **Capitalypse armor**

This resource pack will add the ability to rename armor to anvil and so on for several items (see the gallery).

# **Important:**

Before installing the project, you need to download the [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) mod (If you play on Fabric) or Optifine (If you play on Forge). **And also be sure to install the [RP renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) mod!**

# **Additionally:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This resource pack is in beta, and the author is just starting to learn how to make such resource packs, do not judge strictly by this!

</details>
